key_findings: IQ2_XXS gen speed (27 tok/s) exceeds Q4_K_M (22 tok/s) by 24% due to lower memory pressure
IQ2_XXS uses 9GB less VRAM than Q4_K_M, leaving room for longer context or concurrent requests
Q4_K_M wins on prompt eval (245 vs 153 tok/s) due to higher precision batched matmuls
Trade-off: 2-bit quality is noticeably lower for complex reasoning tasks
